title: eryngium moluccanum
intro: Eryngium moluccanum, also known as Eryngium bourbonicum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems. The medicinal properties of Eryngium moluccanum include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs, colds, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Eryngium moluccanum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are taken orally to promote overall health and well-being.
